basic_details.job_title: KNC Delhi Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Kamala Nehru College Delhi (KNC Delhi) has published the Assistant Professor Notification 2026 under Advt. No. KNC/2026/. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Assistant Professor position on a contractual basis. Candidates possessing the qualifications prescribed under the UGC Regulations for Assistant Professor and the University of Delhi norms are eligible to attend the walkin interview on 28 July 2026. Candidates should refer to the official notification for age limit and other important details. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: Qualifications as per UGC Regulations for Assistant Professor and University of Delhi norms
qualification.details: Assistant Professor: Qualifications and eligibility as per UGC Regulations and University of Delhi norms/guidelines. Minimum API score 55 for UR/ EWS/ OBC, 50 for SC/ ST/ PwBD.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹1500 per lecture subject to maximum ₹50000 per month
salary_details.details: ₹1500 per lecture subject to maximum ₹50000 per month

content_sections.heading: KNC Delhi Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.kamala_nehru_college_delhi_knc_delhi: ₹1500 per lecture subject to maximum ₹50000 per month
Qualifications as per UGC Regulations for Assistant Professor and University of Delhi norms

content_sections.heading: KNC Delhi Assistant Professor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the KNC Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download KNC Delhi Assistant Professor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor: Qualifications and eligibility as per UGC Regulations and University of Delhi norms/guidelines. Minimum API score 55 for UR/ EWS/ OBC, 50 for SC/ ST/ PwBD.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: ₹1500 per lecture subject to maximum ₹50000 per month

content_sections.heading: KNC Delhi Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: KNC Delhi Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the KNC Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Kamala Nehru College Delhi recruitment is Assistant Professor.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Professor post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held on 28th July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The salary is ₹1500 per lecture, subject to a maximum of ₹50000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications required?
faq.answer: Qualifications must be as per UGC Regulations for Assistant Professor and University of Delhi norms.

faq.question: Q7. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview venue is Kamala Nehru College Delhi, New Delhi - 110049.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.
